goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should have 'a star of 4'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'postcode', and 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 08:15' and should leave on 'sunday'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
Make sure you get 'travel time', 'arrival time', and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should include free parking
The hotel should include free wifi and should have a star of 4
Make sure you get phone number, postcode, and address
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave after 08:15 and should leave on sunday
The train should depart from cambridge and should go to london liverpool street
Make sure you get travel time, arrival time, and price
